name: pr-description-quality
description: Validate that the skill produces a well-structured PR description with context, testing details, and review guidance for a feature change.
input: I just finished implementing a new caching layer for our API. It uses Redis to cache GET responses for 5 minutes. I changed the middleware pipeline, added cache invalidation on POST/PUT/DELETE, and updated the config to accept Redis connection strings. The changes touch the auth middleware because I had to reorder the pipeline. Help me write a PR description and prepare this for review.

assertions.description: Must describe the caching feature being added, as this is the core change being reviewed.
Must mention the specific technology (Redis) used for caching, as reviewers need to know the implementation approach.
Must highlight the auth middleware reordering as a risk area, since changes to auth pipeline require careful review.
Must address cache invalidation strategy, as stale cache is the most common caching bug.
Must include a testing section describing how the caching behavior was verified.
Must provide review guidance specifying what kind of feedback is needed and where reviewers should focus.

name: reviewer-selection-and-timeline
description: Validate that the skill recommends appropriate reviewers and manages review timeline for an urgent security fix.
input:
I found and fixed an XSS vulnerability in our user profile page. The fix sanitizes user-generated HTML in the bio field before rendering. It's a 30-line change in the frontend rendering layer plus 10 lines of tests. This needs to ship today because we got a report from a security researcher. We have these potential reviewers:
- Alice: security team lead, currently in meetings until 3pm
- Bob: frontend team lead, currently free, reviewed the original profile page code
- Carol: full-stack developer, free, but new to the team (2 weeks)
- Dave: backend developer, familiar with the sanitization library, in a different timezone (currently 11pm for him)

Help me prepare this review request.

assertions.description: Must recommend Bob as a primary reviewer since he has frontend expertise, is available, and reviewed the original code.
Must recommend involving Alice (security lead) for security sign-off, even if delayed until after her meetings.
Must communicate the urgency of the review given the active security vulnerability and same-day shipping requirement.
Must identify the vulnerability type (XSS) clearly in the review request context.
Must describe the sanitization approach so reviewers can evaluate the fix's completeness.
